data.rationale: Validated-strategies audit. short_term_mr produced 0 trades in fresh backtest because risk.starting_equity=0 in this config breaks position sizing (utils/helpers.py:350 raises ValueError). Cannot validate the strategy until starting_equity is set to a real value. Disable until that bug is fixed and re-test confirms positive Sharpe.

disabled.reason: 0 trades from config bug starting_equity=0 — cannot validate. Mode is passive so no live impact.

renormalized.rationale: Sole remaining strategy after disable; research_best Sharpe 0.5735 (2026-04-02, pre-contamination era) clears 0.4 passive-market threshold.

data.follow_up: Fix starting_equity in this file (currently 0). Same bug exists in defensive_etfs.json + treasury_etfs.json. Re-run scripts/strategy_evaluator.py --strategy short_term_mr --market gold_etfs --combined after fix to determine real performance.
